tests.name: skill-metadata-is-valid
tests.when: An agent checks the skill's structure

agent_behavior: Skill has valid YAML frontmatter with name: skills-engineering
Skill has a non-empty description field
SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
SKILL.md describes the 9-phase TDD lifecycle
generate.sh exists and is executable

tests.name: all-nine-phases-accessible
tests.given: generate.sh is called with each of the 9 phases

agent_behavior: spec phase exits 0 and references spec.md
behavioral phase exits 0 and references BDD contract format
script-test phase exits 0 and includes test template
script phase exits 0 and enforces AC-by-AC discipline
skill phase exits 0 and prohibits eval references
adversary phase exits 0 and instructs studying the target
eval phase exits 0 and runs script tests first
improve phase exits 0 and references .eval-results.json
refactor phase exits 0 and prohibits behavior changes
assert_sh: bash $SKILL_PATH/scripts/generate.sh --phase eval --skill-path /tmp/smk-test 2>&1 | grep -q 'Run script acceptance tests'

agent_behavior: Script exits with non-zero status
Script lists all 9 valid phases in the error message

tests.name: script-acceptance-tests-pass
tests.given: The skills-engineering scripts are fully implemented

agent_behavior: test-generate.sh exits with status 0
test-generate.sh reports zero failures

tests.name: assert-sh-field-valid-in-test-templates
tests.given: The skills-engineering Jinja2 templates are rendered
tests.when: An agent checks the assert_sh field structure

agent_behavior: behavioral-tests.json.j2 includes assert_sh as an optional array under then
adversarial-tests.json.j2 includes assert_sh as an optional array under then
smoke-tests.json.j2 includes assert_sh as an optional array under then
assert_sh values are shell command strings
suite-meta.json has type field with value 'capability'
suite-meta.json has graduated_at field with value null
suite-meta.json has consecutive_full_passes field with numeric value 0
suite-meta.json has required_for_graduation field with numeric value 3
suite-meta.json has last_eval field with value null
assert_sh: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$SKILL_PATH/assets/suite-meta.json')); assert d['type']=='capability'; assert d['graduated_at'] is None; assert d['consecutive_full_passes']==0; assert d['required_for_graduation']==3; assert d['last_eval'] is None"

tests.name: repeat-flag-validates-inputs
tests.given: generate.sh is called with invalid --repeat values

agent_behavior: --repeat abc exits non-zero with error message
--repeat -1 exits non-zero with error message
--repeat 0 exits non-zero with error message
--repeat 1 exits zero with no repeat-N section in output
